g.text: SERVED FROM POSTGRES — precomputed at ingest

g.title: recon
g.text: replays edits to rebuild file content,
tagging every line typed / pasted / external

g.title: note
g.text: The .slog files inside the stored blob ARE the
event stream. Dropping the table removed what had
been the dominant, never-purged storage cost —
and the LRU cache is what makes re-parsing viable.
